\"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/ReentrancyGuard.sol\";\n\nimport \"./VaultManager.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title SavingCore\n * @dev Core business logic for the Online Banking System\n *   - Manages deposit plans (create, update, enable/disable)\n *   - Handles user deposits with ERC721 NFT certificates\n *   - Supports normal withdraw, early withdraw, manual renew, auto-renew\n *   - Simple interest calculated from vault\n */\ncontract SavingCore is ERC721, Ownable, Pausable, ReentrancyGuard {\n    using SafeERC20 for IERC20;\n\n    // ========================\n    // Constants\n    // ========================\n    uint256 public constant SECONDS_PER_YEAR = 365 days;\n    uint256 public constant BPS_DENOMINATOR = 10_000;\n    uint256 public constant GRACE_PERIOD_DAYS = 3; // Personal Variant: (7 mod 3) + 2 = 3\n\n    // ========================\n    // Enums & Structs\n    // ========================\n    enum DepositStatus { Active, Withdrawn, ManualRenewed, AutoRenewed }\n\n    struct Plan {\n        uint256 tenorDays;\n        uint256 aprBps;\n        uint256 minDeposit;\n        uint256 maxDeposit; // 0 = unlimited\n        uint256 earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps;\n        bool enabled;\n    }\n\n    struct Deposit {\n        uint256 planId;\n        address owner;\n        uint256 principal;\n        uint256 startAt;\n        uint256 maturityAt;\n        uint256 aprBpsAtOpen;       // Snapshot APR at deposit time\n        uint256 penaltyBpsAtOpen;   // Snapshot penalty at deposit time\n        DepositStatus status;\n    }\n\n    // ========================\n    // State\n    // ========================\n    VaultManager public immutable vaultManager;\n    IERC20 public immutable usdc;\n    address public feeReceiver; // Receives early withdraw penalties\n\n    mapping(uint256 => Plan) public plans;\n    uint256 public planCount;\n\n    mapping(uint256 => Deposit) public deposits;\n    uint256 public depositCount;\n\n    // Token URI metadata per deposit\n    mapping(uint256 => string) private _tokenURIs;\n\n    // ========================\n    // Events\n    // ========================\n    event PlanCreated(uint256 indexed planId, uint256 tenorDays, uint256 aprBps, uint256 minDeposit, uint256 maxDeposit, uint256 penaltyBps);\n    event PlanAprUpdated(uint256 indexed planId, uint256 oldApr, uint256 newApr);\n    event PlanEnabled(uint256 indexed planId);\n    event PlanDisabled(uint256 indexed planId);\n    event DepositOpened(uint256 indexed depositId, uint256 indexed planId, address owner, uint256 principal, uint256 maturityAt);\n    event DepositWithdrawn(uint256 indexed depositId, uint256 principal, uint256 interest);\n    event DepositEarlyWithdrawn(uint256 indexed depositId, uint256 principal, uint256 penalty);\n    event DepositRenewed(uint256 indexed oldDepositId, uint256 indexed newDepositId, uint256 newPrincipal);\n    event FeeReceiverUpdated(address oldReceiver, address newReceiver);\n\n    // ========================\n    // Constructor\n    // ========================\n    constructor(\n        address _usdc,\n        address _vaultManager,\n        address _feeReceiver\n    ) ERC721(\"SavingCertificate\", \"SCERT\") Ownable(msg.sender) {\n        require(_usdc != address(0), \"Invalid USDC\");\n        require(_vaultManager != address(0), \"Invalid VaultManager\");\n        require(_feeReceiver != address(0), \"Invalid feeReceiver\");\n        usdc = IERC20(_usdc);\n        vaultManager = VaultManager(_vaultManager);\n        feeReceiver = _feeReceiver;\n    }\n\n    // ========================\n    // Admin Functions\n    // ========================\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Create a new deposit plan\n     */\n    function createPlan(\n        uint256 tenorDays,\n        uint256 aprBps,\n        uint256 minDeposit,\n        uint256 maxDeposit,\n        uint256 earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps\n    ) external onlyOwner returns (uint256) {\n        require(tenorDays > 0, \"Tenor must be > 0\");\n        require(aprBps > 0 && aprBps <= 5000, \"Invalid APR\");\n        require(earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps <= 2000, \"Invalid penalty\");\n        require(minDeposit > 0, \"minDeposit must be > 0\");\n\n        uint256 planId = planCount;\n        plans[planId] = Plan({\n            tenorDays: tenorDays,\n            aprBps: aprBps,\n            minDeposit: minDeposit,\n            maxDeposit: maxDeposit,\n            earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps: earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps,\n            enabled: true\n        });\n        planCount++;\n\n        emit PlanCreated(planId, tenorDays, aprBps, minDeposit, maxDeposit, earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps);\n        return planId;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Update only the APR of an existing plan\n     *      Does NOT affect deposits already opened (snapshot)\n     */\n    function updatePlanApr(uint256 planId, uint256 newAprBps) external onlyOwner {\n        require(planId < planCount, \"Plan does not exist\");\n        require(newAprBps > 0 && newAprBps <= 5000, \"Invalid APR\");\n\n        uint256 oldApr = plans[planId].aprBps;\n        plans[planId].aprBps = newAprBps;\n\n        emit PlanAprUpdated(planId, oldApr, newAprBps);\n    }\n\n    function enablePlan(uint256 planId) external onlyOwner {\n        require(planId < planCount, \"Plan does not exist\");\n        require(!plans[planId].enabled, \"Already enabled\");\n        plans[planId].enabled = true;\n        emit PlanEnabled(planId);\n    }\n\n    function disablePlan(uint256 planId) external onlyOwner {\n        require(planId < planCount, \"Plan does not exist\");\n        require(plans[planId].enabled, \"Already disabled\");\n        plans[planId].enabled = false;\n        emit PlanDisabled(planId);\n    }\n\n    function setFeeReceiver(address newReceiver) external onlyOwner {\n        require(newReceiver != address(0), \"Invalid address\");\n        emit FeeReceiverUpdated(feeReceiver, newReceiver);\n        feeReceiver = newReceiver;\n    }\n\n    // ========================\n    // User Functions\n    // ========================\n\n    /**\n     * Flow 1: openDeposit \u2014 Open a new term deposit\n     * @param planId Plan to deposit into\n     * @param amount Amount of USDC to deposit\n     * @return depositId The ID of the new deposit (also the NFT tokenId)\n     */\n    function openDeposit(uint256 planId, uint256 amount) external whenNotPaused nonReentrant returns (uint256) {\n        require(planId < planCount, \"Plan does not exist\");\n        Plan storage plan = plans[planId];\n        require(plan.enabled, \"Plan is disabled\");\n        require(amount >= plan.minDeposit, \"Below minimum deposit\");\n        require(plan.maxDeposit == 0 || amount <= plan.maxDeposit, \"Exceeds maximum deposit\");\n\n        uint256 depositId = depositCount;\n        uint256 maturityAt = block.timestamp + (plan.tenorDays * 1 days);\n\n        deposits[depositId] = Deposit({\n            planId: planId,\n            owner: msg.sender,\n            principal: amount,\n            startAt: block.timestamp,\n            maturityAt: maturityAt,\n            aprBpsAtOpen: plan.aprBps,\n            penaltyBpsAtOpen: plan.earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps,\n            status: DepositStatus.Active\n        });\n        depositCount++;\n\n        // Transfer USDC from user to VaultManager\n        usdc.safeTransferFrom(msg.sender, address(vaultManager), amount);\n        vaultManager.depositToVault(amount);\n\n        // Mint ERC721 NFT certificate\n        _mint(msg.sender, depositId);\n        _tokenURIs[depositId] = \"\";\n\n        emit DepositOpened(depositId, planId, msg.sender, amount, maturityAt);\n        return depositId;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Flow 2: withdrawAtMaturity \u2014 Withdraw after maturity with simple interest\n     *      Interest comes from VaultManager (not from principal pool)\n     * @param depositId The deposit to withdraw\n     */\n    function withdrawAtMaturity(uint256 depositId) external whenNotPaused nonReentrant {\n        require(depositId < depositCount, \"Deposit does not exist\");\n        Deposit storage dep = deposits[depositId];\n        require(dep.owner == msg.sender, \"Not your deposit\");\n        require(dep.status == DepositStatus.Active, \"Not active\");\n        require(block.timestamp >= dep.maturityAt, \"Not yet matured\");\n\n        // Calculate simple interest\n        uint256 interest = calculateInterest(dep.principal, dep.aprBpsAtOpen, dep.maturityAt - dep.startAt);\n\n        // Withdraw principal from tracked deposits, interest from vault reserves\n        vaultManager.withdrawFromVault(msg.sender, dep.principal);\n        if (interest > 0) {\n            vaultManager.withdrawInterest(msg.sender, interest);\n        }\n\n        dep.status = DepositStatus.Withdrawn;\n\n        // Burn NFT\n        _burn(depositId);\n\n        emit DepositWithdrawn(depositId, dep.principal, interest);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Flow 3: earlyWithdraw \u2014 Withdraw before maturity with penalty, 0 interest\n     *      Penalty goes to feeReceiver\n     * @param depositId The deposit to withdraw early\n     */\n    function earlyWithdraw(uint256 depositId) external whenNotPaused nonReentrant {\n        require(depositId < depositCount, \"Deposit does not exist\");\n        Deposit storage dep = deposits[depositId];\n        require(dep.owner == msg.sender, \"Not your deposit\");\n        require(dep.status == DepositStatus.Active, \"Not active\");\n\n        // Calculate penalty: principal * penaltyBps / 10000\n        uint256 penalty = (dep.principal * dep.penaltyBpsAtOpen) / BPS_DENOMINATOR;\n\n        // User gets principal - penalty, feeReceiver gets penalty\n        uint256 userPayout = dep.principal - penalty;\n\n        if (penalty > 0) {\n            vaultManager.withdrawFromVault(feeReceiver, penalty);\n        }\n        vaultManager.withdrawFromVault(msg.sender, userPayout);\n\n        dep.status = DepositStatus.Withdrawn;\n\n        // Burn NFT\n        _burn(depositId);\n\n        emit DepositEarlyWithdrawn(depositId, dep.principal, penalty);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Flow 4: renewDeposit \u2014 Manual renew with new plan\n     *      Interest from old deposit is added to new principal\n     *      New deposit gets its own snapshot of current plan APR/penalty\n     * @param depositId The matured deposit to renew\n     * @param newPlanId The new plan to deposit into\n     * @return newDepositId The ID of the new deposit\n     */\n    function renewDeposit(uint256 depositId, uint256 newPlanId) external whenNotPaused nonReentrant returns (uint256) {\n        require(depositId < depositCount, \"Deposit does not exist\");\n        Deposit storage oldDep = deposits[depositId];\n        require(oldDep.owner == msg.sender, \"Not your deposit\");\n        require(oldDep.status == DepositStatus.Active, \"Not active\");\n        require(block.timestamp >= oldDep.maturityAt, \"Not yet matured\");\n        require(newPlanId < planCount, \"New plan does not exist\");\n        require(plans[newPlanId].enabled, \"New plan is disabled\");\n\n        // Calculate interest from old deposit\n        uint256 interest = calculateInterest(oldDep.principal, oldDep.aprBpsAtOpen, oldDep.maturityAt - oldDep.startAt);\n        uint256 newPrincipal = oldDep.principal + interest;\n\n        // Check new plan constraints\n        Plan storage newPlan = plans[newPlanId];\n        require(newPrincipal >= newPlan.minDeposit, \"New principal below minimum\");\n        require(newPlan.maxDeposit == 0 || newPrincipal <= newPlan.maxDeposit, \"New principal exceeds maximum\");\n\n        // Mark old deposit as renewed\n        oldDep.status = DepositStatus.ManualRenewed;\n        _burn(depositId);\n\n        // Create new deposit\n        uint256 newDepositId = depositCount;\n        uint256 newMaturityAt = block.timestamp + (newPlan.tenorDays * 1 days);\n\n        deposits[newDepositId] = Deposit({\n            planId: newPlanId,\n            owner: msg.sender,\n            principal: newPrincipal,\n            startAt: block.timestamp,\n            maturityAt: newMaturityAt,\n            aprBpsAtOpen: newPlan.aprBps,\n            penaltyBpsAtOpen: newPlan.earlyWithdrawPenaltyBps,\n            status: DepositStatus.Active\n        });\n        depositCount++;\n\n        // Mint new NFT\n        _mint(msg.sender, newDepositId);\n\n        emit DepositRenewed(depositId, newDepositId, newPrincipal);\n        return newDepositId;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Flow 5: autoRenewDeposit \u2014 Auto-renew after grace period\n     *      Only callable after maturityAt + GRACE_PERIOD_DAYS\n     *      Keeps original APR/penalty snapshot, same plan\n     * @param depositId The deposit to auto-renew\n     * @return newDepositId The ID of the new deposit\n     */\n    function autoRenewDeposit(uint256 depositId) external whenNotPaused nonReentrant returns (uint256) {\n        require(depositId < depositCount, \"Deposit does not exist\");\n        Deposit storage oldDep = deposits[depositId];\n        require(oldDep.status == DepositStatus.Active, \"Not active\");\n\n        uint256 gracePeriodEnd = oldDep.maturityAt + (GRACE_PERIOD_DAYS * 1 days);\n        require(block.timestamp >= gracePeriodEnd, \"Grace period not ended\");\n\n        // Calculate interest from old deposit\n        uint256 interest = calculateInterest(oldDep.principal, oldDep.aprBpsAtOpen, oldDep.maturityAt - oldDep.startAt);\n        uint256 newPrincipal = oldDep.principal + interest;\n\n        // Same plan, same APR, same penalty (snapshots from original)\n        Plan storage currentPlan = plans[oldDep.planId];\n\n        // Mark old deposit as auto-renewed\n        oldDep.status = DepositStatus.AutoRenewed;\n        _burn(depositId);\n\n        // Create new deposit with original snapshots\n        uint256 newDepositId = depositCount;\n        uint256 newMaturityAt = block.timestamp + (currentPlan.tenorDays * 1 days);\n\n        deposits[newDepositId] = Deposit({\n            planId: oldDep.planId,\n            owner: oldDep.owner,\n            principal: newPrincipal,\n            startAt: block.timestamp,\n            maturityAt: newMaturityAt,\n            aprBpsAtOpen: oldDep.aprBpsAtOpen,     // Keep original APR\n            penaltyBpsAtOpen: oldDep.penaltyBpsAtOpen, // Keep original penalty\n            status: DepositStatus.Active\n        });\n        depositCount++;\n\n        // Mint new NFT for original owner\n        _mint(oldDep.owner, newDepositId);\n\n        emit DepositRenewed(depositId, newDepositId, newPrincipal);\n        return newDepositId;\n    }\n\n    // ========================\n    // View Functions\n    // ========================\n\n    function calculateInterest(uint256 principal, uint256 aprBps, uint256 tenorSeconds) public pure returns (uint256) {\n        return (principal * aprBps * tenorSeconds) / (SECONDS_PER_YEAR * BPS_DENOMINATOR);\n    }\n\n    function getDeposit(uint256 depositId) external view returns (Deposit memory) {\n        require(depositId < depositCount, \"Deposit does not exist\");\n        return deposits[depositId];\n    }\n\n    function getPlan(uint256 planId) external view returns (Plan memory) {\n        require(planId < planCount, \"Plan does not exist\");\n        return plans[planId];\n    }\n\n    function getUserDeposits(address user) external view returns (uint256[] memory) {\n        uint256 count = 0;\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < depositCount; i++) {\n            if (deposits[i].owner == user) count++;\n        }\n\n        uint256[] memory result = new uint256[](count);\n        uint256 idx = 0;\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < depositCount; i++) {\n            if (deposits[i].owner == user) {\n                result[idx] = i;\n                idx++;\n            }\n        }\n        return result;\n    }\n\n    // ========================\n    // ERC721 Metadata\n    // ========================\n\n    function tokenURI(uint256 tokenId) public view override returns (string memory) {\n        require(_ownerOf(tokenId) != address(0), \"Token does not exist\");\n        string memory uri = _tokenURIs[tokenId];\n        return uri;\n    }\n\n    function setTokenURI(uint256 tokenId, string memory uri) external onlyOwner {\n        require(_ownerOf(tokenId) != address(0), \"Token does not exist\");\n        _tokenURIs[tokenId] = uri;\n    }\n\n    // ========================\n    // Pause / Unpause\n    // ========================\n\n    function pause() external onlyOwner {\n        _pause();\n    }\n\n    function unpause() external onlyOwner {\n        _unpause();\n    }\n\n    // ========================\n    // Receive (for any accidental ERC20 transfers)\n    // ========================\n    receive() external payable {}\n}\n","keccak256":"0x955d316f17eff745f37bfe2724054625ae8079e9a41dab0fa2eb564c85d84dd5","license":"MIT"},"contracts/VaultManager.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity ^0.8.28;\n\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20.sol\";\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol\";\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/access/Ownable.sol\";\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/Pausable.sol\";\nimport \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/ReentrancyGuard.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title VaultManager\n * @dev Manages the liquidity pool for the Online Banking System\n *   - Holds USDC as liquidity for user deposits\n *   - Owner can fund/withdraw to manage reserves\n *   - SavingCore calls depositToVault/withdrawFromVault\n *   - Pausable for emergency stops\n *   - ReentrancyGuard on all external transfers\n */\ncontract VaultManager is Ownable, Pausable, ReentrancyGuard {\n    using SafeERC20 for IERC20;\n\n    IERC20 public immutable usdc;\n    uint256 public totalDeposits; // Sum of all user deposits tracked\n\n    event VaultFunded(address indexed owner, uint256 amount);\n    event VaultWithdrawn(address indexed owner, uint256 amount);\n    event DepositRecorded(uint256 amount);\n    event WithdrawalRecorded(uint256 amount);\n    event PausedByOwner();\n    event UnpausedByOwner();\n\n    constructor(address _usdc) Ownable(msg.sender) {\n        require(_usdc != address(0), \"Invalid USDC address\");\n        usdc = IERC20(_usdc);\n    }\n\n    // ========================\n    // Owner Functions\n    // ========================\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Owner deposits USDC into vault as liquidity reserve\n     * @param amount Amount of USDC to deposit\n     */\n    function fund(uint256 amount) external onlyOwner whenNotPaused {\n        require(amount > 0, \"Amount must be > 0\");\n        usdc.safeTransferFrom(msg.sender, address(this), amount);\n        emit VaultFunded(msg.sender, amount);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Owner withdraws USDC from vault\n     * @param amount Amount of USDC to withdraw\n     */\n    function withdraw(uint256 amount) external onlyOwner nonReentrant {\n        require(amount > 0, \"Amount must be > 0\");\n        require(\n            usdc.balanceOf(address(this)) - totalDeposits >= amount,\n            \"Insufficient free balance\"\n        );\n        usdc.safeTransfer(msg.sender, amount);\n        emit VaultWithdrawn(msg.sender, amount);\n    }\n\n    // ========================\n    // SavingCore Callbacks\n    // ========================\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Called by SavingCore when a user opens a deposit\n     *      Records the deposit and accepts USDC transfer\n     * @param amount Amount deposited by user\n     */\n    function depositToVault(uint256 amount) external whenNotPaused {\n        require(amount > 0, \"Amount must be > 0\");\n        totalDeposits += amount;\n        // USDC is transferred to VaultManager by SavingCore before calling this\n        emit DepositRecorded(amount);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Called by SavingCore when a user withdraws principal\n     *      Transfers USDC back to the user and reduces tracked deposits\n     * @param to Recipient address\n     * @param amount Amount to withdraw (principal)\n     */\n    function withdrawFromVault(address to, uint256 amount) external whenNotPaused nonReentrant {\n        require(amount > 0, \"Amount must be > 0\");\n        require(totalDeposits >= amount, \"Insufficient deposits tracked\");\n        totalDeposits -= amount;\n        usdc.safeTransfer(to, amount);\n        emit WithdrawalRecorded(amount);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Called by SavingCore to pay interest from vault reserves\n     *      Does NOT reduce totalDeposits (interest comes from owner-funded liquidity)\n     * @param to Recipient address\n     * @param amount Interest amount to pay\n     */\n    function withdrawInterest(address to, uint256 amount) external whenNotPaused nonReentrant {\n        require(amount > 0, \"Amount must be > 0\");\n        require(\n            usdc.balanceOf(address(this)) >= totalDeposits + amount,\n            \"Insufficient vault balance for interest\"\n        );\n        usdc.safeTransfer(to, amount);\n        emit WithdrawalRecorded(amount);\n    }\n\n    // ========================\n    // Pause / Unpause\n    // ========================\n\n    function pause() external onlyOwner {\n        _pause();\n        emit PausedByOwner();\n    }\n\n    function unpause() external onlyOwner {\n        _unpause();\n        emit UnpausedByOwner();\n    }\n\n    // ========================\n    // View Functions\n    // ========================\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Actual USDC balance held by this contract\n     */\n    function vaultBalance() external view returns (uint256) {\n        return usdc.balanceOf(address(this));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Vault is solvent if actual balance >= total tracked deposits\n     */\n    function isSolvent() external view returns (bool) {\n        return usdc.balanceOf(address(this)) >= totalDeposits;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Available liquidity = actual balance - tracked deposits\n     *      This is the \"free\" USDC owner funded but not yet deposited by users\n     */\n    function getAvailableLiquidity() external view returns (uint256) {\n        return usdc.balanceOf(address(this)) - totalDeposits;\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0xa15bba28244b62a519864e654662e0bf13acb9c1a79428944b996d391d658e3b","license":"MIT"}},"version":1}

devdoc.details: Core business logic for the Online Banking System   - Manages deposit plans (create, update, enable/disable)   - Handles user deposits with ERC721 NFT certificates   - Supports normal withdraw, early withdraw, manual renew, auto-renew   - Simple interest calculated from vault

params.sender: Address whose tokens are being transferred.

params.operator: Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.

ERC721InvalidApprover(address).details: Indicates a failure with the `approver` of a token to be approved. Used in approvals.

ERC721InvalidOperator(address).details: Indicates a failure with the `operator` to be approved. Used in approvals.

params.operator: Address that may be allowed to operate on tokens without being their owner.

ERC721InvalidReceiver(address).details: Indicates a failure with the token `receiver`. Used in transfers.

ERC721InvalidSender(address).details: Indicates a failure with the token `sender`. Used in transfers.

ERC721NonexistentToken(uint256).details: Indicates a `tokenId` whose `owner` is the zero address.

EnforcedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is paused.

ExpectedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is not paused.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

ApprovalForAll(address,address,bool).details: Emitted when `owner` enables or disables (`approved`) `operator` to manage all of its assets.

approve(address,uint256).details: Gives permission to `to` to transfer `tokenId` token to another account. The approval is cleared when the token is transferred. Only a single account can be approved at a time, so approving the zero address clears previous approvals. Requirements: - The caller must own the token or be an approved operator. - `tokenId` must exist. Emits an {Approval} event.

returns._0: newDepositId The ID of the new deposit

balanceOf(address).details: Returns the number of tokens in ``owner``'s account.

getApproved(uint256).details: Returns the account approved for `tokenId` token. Requirements: - `tokenId` must exist.

isApprovedForAll(address,address).details: Returns if the `operator` is allowed to manage all of the assets of `owner`. See {setApprovalForAll}

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

safeTransferFrom(address,address,uint256.details: Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`, checking first that contract recipients are aware of the ERC-721 protocol to prevent tokens from being forever locked. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must have been allowed to move this token by either {approve} or   {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event.

Safely transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must exist and be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must be approved to move this token by either {approve} or {setApprovalForAll}. - If `to` refers to a smart contract, it must implement {IERC721Receiver-onERC721Received}, which is called upon   a safe transfer. Emits a {Transfer} event.

setApprovalForAll(address,bool).details: Approve or remove `operator` as an operator for the caller. Operators can call {transferFrom} or {safeTransferFrom} for any token owned by the caller. Requirements: - The `operator` cannot be the address zero. Emits an {ApprovalForAll} event.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

tokenURI(uint256).details: Returns the Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) for `tokenId` token.

transferFrom(address,address,uint256).details: Transfers `tokenId` token from `from` to `to`. WARNING: Note that the caller is responsible to confirm that the recipient is capable of receiving ERC-721 or else they may be permanently lost. Usage of {safeTransferFrom} prevents loss, though the caller must understand this adds an external call which potentially creates a reentrancy vulnerability. Requirements: - `from` cannot be the zero address. - `to` cannot be the zero address. - `tokenId` token must be owned by `from`. - If the caller is not `from`, it must be approved to move this token by either {approve} or {setApprovalForAll}. Emits a {Transfer} event.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.
